g.text: Module 2: VDBE OpCode Binary Layout (24-Byte Padded Struct)
sizeof(VdbeOp) = 24 bytes | Cache-line aligned (64B) if array allocated.

ul.li: Output: Circular buffer of token structs to avoid allocation spikes.
Algorithm: LALR(1) via Lemon Parser generator.
Memory: Uses a custom Lookahead buffer and recursive descent for sub-expressions.
Registers: Standard VM contains 200+ registers per program.
Instruction Flow: OP_SeekGE performs a B-Tree search. If the key exists, the PC continues; otherwise, it jumps to P2.
Alignment: Structs are 8-byte aligned to ensure atomic pointer reads for P4.
